scripts.build: pnpm --filter @tupl/foundation build && pnpm --filter @tupl/provider-kit build && pnpm --filter @tupl/schema-model build && pnpm --filter @tupl/planner build && pnpm --filter @tupl/runtime build && pnpm --filter @tupl/schema build && pnpm -r --filter @tupl/provider-drizzle --filter @tupl/provider-ioredis --filter @tupl/provider-kysely --filter @tupl/provider-objection build
scripts.clean: rm -rf packages/foundation/dist packages/provider-kit/dist packages/schema-model/dist packages/planner/dist packages/runtime/dist packages/schema/dist packages/provider-*/dist examples/basic/dist
scripts.verify: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm fmt
scripts.verify:ci: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test:ci && pnpm fmt:check
scripts.example:drizzle:build: pnpm run build && pnpm --dir examples/_shared build && pnpm --dir examples/drizzle build
scripts.example:kysely:build: pnpm run build && pnpm --dir examples/_shared build && pnpm --dir examples/kysely build
scripts.example:objection:build: pnpm run build && pnpm --dir examples/_shared build && pnpm --dir examples/objection build
scripts.publish:public: pnpm --filter @tupl/foundation publish --access public && pnpm --filter @tupl/provider-kit publish --access public && pnpm --filter @tupl/schema-model publish --access public && pnpm --filter @tupl/planner publish --access public && pnpm --filter @tupl/runtime publish --access public && pnpm --filter @tupl/schema publish --access public && pnpm -r --filter @tupl/provider-drizzle --filter @tupl/provider-ioredis --filter @tupl/provider-kysely --filter @tupl/provider-objection publish --access public
scripts.publish:public:dry-run: pnpm --filter @tupl/foundation publish --access public --dry-run && pnpm --filter @tupl/provider-kit publish --access public --dry-run && pnpm --filter @tupl/schema-model publish --access public --dry-run && pnpm --filter @tupl/planner publish --access public --dry-run && pnpm --filter @tupl/runtime publish --access public --dry-run && pnpm --filter @tupl/schema publish --access public --dry-run && pnpm -r --filter @tupl/provider-drizzle --filter @tupl/provider-ioredis --filter @tupl/provider-kysely --filter @tupl/provider-objection publish --access public --dry-run
